languages.text: "Ясно. Увы, это не проливает свет на то, кем он являлся на самом деле. Хотя элегантная внешность действительно характерна для представителей знатного сословия. И вы тому немалое подтверждение".

traits.locale_text: "Ясно. Увы, это не проливает свет на то, кем он являлся на самом деле. Хотя элегантная внешность действительно характерна для представителей знатного сословия. И вы тому немалое подтверждение".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum_MB

languages.text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."
languages.original_text: "Ясно. Увы, это не проливает свет на то, кем он являлся на самом деле. Хотя элегантная внешность действительно характерна для представителей знатного сословия. И вы тому немалое подтверждение".

traits.locale_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."
"I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."
"I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

languages.text: “我明白了。可惜，这还是无法说明他究竟是个什么样的人。虽然仪表出众的确是贵族的典型特征——这点您本人就是最好的例子。”
languages.original_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

traits.locale_text: “我明白了。可惜，这还是无法说明他究竟是个什么样的人。虽然仪表出众的确是贵族的典型特征——这点您本人就是最好的例子。”

languages.text: «Ya veo. Por desgracia, eso no dice mucho de su identidad. Aunque un porte elegante es sin duda propio de la aristocracia. Y usted es la prueba fehaciente de ello».
languages.original_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

traits.locale_text: «Ya veo. Por desgracia, eso no dice mucho de su identidad. Aunque un porte elegante es sin duda propio de la aristocracia. Y usted es la prueba fehaciente de ello».

languages.text: « Je vois. Hélas, cela ne nous permet pas de savoir qui il était vraiment. Cela étant, une apparence élégante est un signe de noblesse. Vous en êtes bien la preuve. »
languages.original_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois. Hélas, cela ne nous permet pas de savoir qui il était vraiment. Cela étant, une apparence élégante est un signe de noblesse. Vous en êtes bien la preuve. »

languages.text: "Ich verstehe. Leider erklärt das nicht, wer er wirklich war. Wobei ein elegantes Auftreten in der Tat ein Zeichen des Adels ist. Ihr seid dafür das beste Beispiel."
languages.original_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe. Leider erklärt das nicht, wer er wirklich war. Wobei ein elegantes Auftreten in der Tat ein Zeichen des Adels ist. Ihr seid dafür das beste Beispiel."

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Ne yazık ki bu, onun gerçekte kim olduğuna dair hiçbir şey aydınlatmıyor. Her ne kadar zarif bir görünüm gerçekten de soyluluğun bir işareti olsa da. Ki siz de bunun büyük bir kanıtısınız."
languages.original_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Ne yazık ki bu, onun gerçekte kim olduğuna dair hiçbir şey aydınlatmıyor. Her ne kadar zarif bir görünüm gerçekten de soyluluğun bir işareti olsa da. Ki siz de bunun büyük bir kanıtısınız."

languages.text: 「なるほど。しかし、彼の本質を知る手がかりにはなりません。とはいえ、貴族の証として、確かに華麗な容姿はあります。そして、あなたはその証として、決して小さくはありません」
languages.original_text: "I see. Alas, this sheds no light on who he really was. Although an elegant appearance is indeed a hallmark of the nobility. And you are no small proof of that."

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど。しかし、彼の本質を知る手がかりにはなりません。とはいえ、貴族の証として、確かに華麗な容姿はあります。そして、あなたはその証として、決して小さくはありません」
